channel.title: intelligence on Kuldeep Singh
channel.description: Recent content in intelligence on Kuldeep Singh

item.title: Immersive AI: Transforming Reality with Intelligence and Interaction
item.author: thinkuldeep@gmail.com (Kuldeep Singh)
item.description: Recently REA Cyber City hosted their annual flagship event Global TechFest 2026. I had the privilege of being invited as guest speaker along with prominent speakers there! I discussed on the topic of “Immersive AI: Transforming Reality with Intelligence and Interaction” Session Highlights In my presentation, I addressed one of the biggest challenges today — the misunderstanding of the term “metaverse.” I shared that the metaverse is not:
